items.summary: MANCHESTER CITY legends Bernardo Silva and Rodri were involved in an angry spat in the final seconds of their World Cup clash. items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO'S final World Cup clash ended in heartbreak as he was brought to tears after Portugal suffered a last-16 defeat to Spain. items.title: Spain dump Ronaldo's Portugal out of World Cup with stoppage-time win
items.summary: Spain laboured to an uninspiring 1-0 victory over Iberian rivals Portugal in their last-16 tie to set up a quarter-final meeting with the winners of USA vs Belgium.

items.title: Super-sub Merino delivers 'killer goal' for Spain
items.summary: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino coolly scores in added time to break Portuguese hearts, sending his side through to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Merino strikes at the death for Spain to send Portugal and Ronaldo limping out
items.summary: It ended with a goal from a tall, slightly ungainly figure driving through the centre-forward position – but perhaps not the one that the narrative demanded. items.title: Harry Kane reveals he has his voice back after ‘all-timer of an interview’ following England’s World Cup win over Mexico
items.summary: HARRY KANE admits he has loved seeing everyone crack up at his croaky-voiced interview after England's stunning win over Mexico. items.title: FA considering appeal after Quansah red card
items.summary: The Football Association is considering whether to appeal after England defender Jarell Quansah's red card against Mexico.

items.title: I fulfilled lifelong dream at World Cup but Mbappe left me thinking it will be impossible for England to win it
